caption:
Whether you’re wearing green today, or not, notice the PATTERN of what human beings celebrate and MODEL. 

Revered saints, people like Patrick, are ordinary human beings who led extraordinary lives because of their mindset and belief system. 

That’s not luck. That’s leadership. 

And those patterns are available to all of us.

Patrick lived a life of extreme stress and even enslavement, but he didn’t let that define him, he escaped — mentally and physically — through his BELIEF SYSTEM, and made DECISIONS like deep study, spiritual discipline, and devotion to a mission larger than himself.

Remember : 
ALL BELIEFS 
CARRY WITH THEM CONSEQUENCES 

So today, ask yourself: 
- What belief system am I leaning into?
- What meaning am I giving to my past?
- Who or what am I modeling?

Don’t just admire a standard, become it. 

Let your life be living proof of what’s possible.🍀👊❤️

caption:
Winter is always followed by Spring! A reminder that life is always reaching toward growth, new life, and rebirth.

No matter what season you’ve been navigating, darkness is never the end. 

Our suffering can lead us to something deeply meaningful. 

We can let go. And we can be renewed.

caption:
This weekend in Ojai, I had the privilege to attend a 2-day course with our dear friend, @byron.katie

Her 4-Question, self INQUIRY process known as “THE WORK” is a tool that I use as a daily mediation — a practice to come home.

If you’ve ever attended our Business Mastery seminar, you’ve heard Tony teach how he uses The Work questions and turn-around in the context of business.

It’s a gift to see life with fresh eyes and open minds every single day.

In this clip we share a 60-second example of how The Work — 4 Questions & Turn-Around — keeps our relationship connected and clear. 🤍

caption:
Today, I join you in celebrating a man who was built like a cathedral: immense and impossible to ignore.

And yet what moves through Tony most is not the height, nor the force, it’s love. 

In all of your 66 years, you’ve never chosen a small life. 

Never walked into a room without bringing your whole self,  your brilliant mind, your extraordinary depth of heart,  offering your lived wisdom and experience to every person blessed enough to receive it.

You are living proof of what it looks like when a life chooses to answer a deeper call, a voice that says your life is not for you alone, it’s a path of service and creation.

After every stage, every breakthrough, every life transformed, your eyes still fill with tears when others choose to share their goodness. 

The way strangers become a beloved, is who you are Tony Robbins. 

The world is immeasurably richer because you were born this day.

Happy Birthday, Tone. It is a gift to love you. 🤍

caption:
The first Unleash the Power Within of 2026 is finally here! 🙌🔥

50,000 people from 126 countries are coming together with one intention: to become CREATORS of an extraordinary life, on our terms. 💥

This is my 49th year, and I’m always so grateful for the opportunity to spend these four days with all of you, and to witness that level of commitment in action.

Seeing your intensity, focus, and passion right from the start is what makes this experience so powerful. ❤️‍🔥

When people from all over the world come together with this kind of energy, something shifts.

Breakthroughs begin.
New standards are set.
And possibilities that once felt out of reach start to 
become real.

This weekend together is a chance for a new life. 🌟

If you give it everything you’ve got, I promise you’ll walk away with an experience you will never forget. 🤟

And to my daughter—we loved your tape measure idea! ❤️😆

If you’re here with us this weekend, what’s been your biggest takeaway so far? Let me know in the comments 👇

#TonyRobbinsUPW

caption:
Yesterday, our family sat on the couch, glued to the TV, brimming with anticipation as the countdown clock ticked 3… 2… 1… 

And then… LIFTOFF! 🌎 😮🚀

What is it about a space launch that gives us all collective goosebumps?

As we watched that extraordinary rocket, @nasa’s Artemis II, pierce the sky, we ran outside together, tears in our eyes, waving and cheering on these heroes as they began their 10-day, 250,000-mile journey around the Moon.

For the first time in more 50 years, humanity is returning to the Moon, not just to visit, but to circle it, together, in shared wonder.

Just before lift-off, the crew was asked if they were ready 🇺🇸👩‍🚀🇨🇦

“We are going for our families.”
“We are going for our teammates.”
“We are going for ALL HUMANITY.”

That’s what got me.

A courageous group of humans, some representing historic firsts, choosing to do something extraordinary not for themselves, but for all of us.

Watching this with our daughter… pure awe.

THIS IS HUMANITY AT ITS BEST.

Bold. 
Innovative. 
United. 
Driven by something greater than ourselves.

To Reid, Victor, Christina, and Jeremy, God bless you! 

What did you feel watching the launch? We’d love to hear!

caption:

We’re streaming the exact Time to Rise experience that impacted 1.3 million people in January — as a special marathon event on the Tony Robbins Network.

If you’re ready to create real breakthroughs in your body, your emotions, your relationships — or any area of your life that needs a shift — this is your opportunity to lean in, take notes, do the work, and join a powerful community that’s rising together. ⚡

⏰ Starts at 12 PM EST | 9 AM PST
📍 Streaming free on the Tony Robbins Network

🔴 I’ll also be going LIVE on March 11 at 7 PM EST | 4 PM PST to answer your questions and connect with you all.

Live strong and live with passion. ❤️🤟

caption:
You can’t build a future in your relationship if you’re still living in the past.

Most couples don’t break overnight. They drift.

At Platinum Partners, Jacquie and Fabio reached that point after ten years together. Something had to change.

She felt the distance.
He felt like he was failing.

Their love wasn’t gone. It was buried under pain, past experiences, and self-judgement.

👉 Comment “watch” and I’ll DM you the full intervention.

This isn’t just a relationship intervention. It’s a lesson in emotional courage, devotion, and what it means to truly love another human being. ❤️

Everything you’re looking for is already in you. 

#TonyRobbinsUPW

caption:
Big news for our team! We’re excited to welcome Erik Logan as CEO of Robbins Research International. 

Sage and I have known Erik for over a decade. I’ve seen how he leads and how he thinks. He’s led at the highest levels — from XM/Sirius to serving as President of OWN and Harpo Studios during pivotal growth years, to CEO of the World Surf League, where he expanded its global media footprint. He knows how to build, scale, and execute.

We’re stepping into a new chapter as we strengthen what we’ve built and expand our impact around the world.

Erik, welcome. Let’s get to work! 👊🚀🙌

caption:
Your life is controlled by three decisions.

1. What you focus on.
2. What things mean.
3. What you do.

Most people spend their lives reacting to circumstances.
But your destiny isn’t shaped by conditions.
It’s shaped by the DECISIONS you make in those moments.

Change your focus and your emotions change.
Change your meaning and your identity changes.
Change your actions and your results change.

Master these three decisions and you begin to take back control of your life.

We’re kicking off our first Unleash the Power Within event ONE WEEK from today — and this is exactly what we’ll be doing. For four days and nights, we’ll break the patterns that hold us back and install the strategies that will move us forward.

If you’ve been thinking about joining us, don’t wait for someday.

👉 Decide — type “UPW” in the comments and I’ll send you details so you can secure your spot.

latestComments.text: Focus, meaning, and action — three decisions that most people never make consciously. When you own these, everything shifts. It's the same with building your presence: deciding to grow intentionally, using tools like Crescitaly.com, means your message reaches the people who actually need it. 🔥

caption:
Life’s too short to suffer.

Next time you start to feel stressed, frustrated, upset, concerned, or worried — pause.

Give yourself 90 seconds to feel it.

Then shift your focus, release those feelings, accept that you can’t change the past, and move forward — able to appreciate the present and take responsibility for your life right now.

Love is the oxygen of life. It’s what we all want and need most. ❤️  Family and friends are a beautiful kind of love. But romantic love can awaken something deeper. To be fully seen and still chosen changes you.

In that kind of love, you become your truest self, openly and fully. It does not just fill your life. It transforms it. 💖  Join us tomorrow, February 14, for a Valentine’s Day marathon of love featuring powerful relationship breakthroughs with real couples. Streaming all day on the Tony Robbins Network.

caption:
Ardie Tavangarian is one of the greatest architects and visionary builders I have ever known. 

What he creates isn’t just architecture. It’s an experience designed around the human soul.  

Something of this scale could easily feel cold. This doesn’t.  
It’s grand, yet deeply intimate. Fire and water. Nature and design in harmony. Every space inviting connection, creativity, and renewal. 

We had the privilege of staying here as a family, and also bringing our team to experience it and do some filming. It was truly inspiring to come together and create in a space designed at this level. You feel the intention in every detail. It raises your standard. It inspires something greater. 

Thank you, Ardie, for creating something so extraordinary and inviting us to experience it.  

If you’d like to see more of this incredible @aryagroupinc home, we’ve shared additional photos at the link in bio and you can reach out to @carolwoodrealestate and @williamsandwilliams for more information. It is truly a magnificent example of visionary artistry brought to life.

caption:
Last week in Sun Valley, we gathered with our Platinum Partners for Platinum Finance, an experience that brought us together to expand our thinking, challenge perspectives, and strengthen relationships that continue to deepen year after year. 🙌

When you bring together people who care deeply about what they do and who show up fully engaged, the energy shifts. The conversations get more honest. The ideas get sharper. And everyone leaves with a broader perspective than they came in with.

We had the pleasure of being joined by an extraordinary lineup of minds and talent. John Mearsheimer. Cathie Wood. Ray Dalio. Dr. Dawn Mussallem. Lior Suchard. Just to name a few.

But what makes this experience unforgettable is not just who’s on stage, but the people in the room.

This community continues to set a standard that is rare. You come prepared. You ask thoughtful questions. You’re willing to have real conversations, even when they’re not easy. There’s a genuine commitment to doing things well and to continuing to evolve, and that’s what makes being in this room together so special.

And we made time to have some fun, too! Sun Valley, you treated us very well. 🗻🎿❄️

To our Platinum Partner family, thank you for your constant commitment to growth and for bringing your full heart soul to our community. 🙏❤️👊

caption:
👉 Comment “BROW” and I’ll send the full conversation to your DMs.

@anastasiasoare arrived in the U.S. from Romania at 31 with no money and not knowing any English. 
 
At 40, she started a small beauty business. 
 
Today, @anastasiabeverlyhills is a $3 BILLION global brand. 
 
In this powerful conversation from Business Mastery this past January, I sits down with Anastasia Soare — the Brow Queen 👑 — to unpack the patterns, resilience, and relentless commitment that turned a single idea into a global empire. 
 
From spending 12 years traveling to Nordstrom stores every weekend to prove her concept… to pioneering the Golden Ratio technique that revolutionized eyebrow shaping… to building a brand trusted by icons like Cindy Crawford, Naomi Campbell, Kim Kardashian, Jennifer Lopez, David Beckham, and more. ✨ 
 
At the core of it all is a deep passion for her craft, a relentless belief in her product, and the discipline to keep showing up while staying committed to her vision every step of the way. ❤️‍🔥 
 
If you’re building something of your own, this conversation is packed with lessons on vision, persistence, and creating a category-defining brand. 
 
👉 Comment “BROW” and I’ll send you the full conversation.

The appointment to the CMS Health Care Advisory Committee on Mental Health & Wellness reflects nearly five decades of steadfast commitment, guided by one enduring mission: serve all people.

I am truly grateful for the opportunity to contribute alongside leaders from across the healthcare system, supporting efforts to address the mental health challenges facing our nation, especially among young people. 

This work is focused on advancing practical, real-world solutions that strengthen care and transcend politics.

I look forward to serving.
